install_addon.title: Install Add-on First
install_addon.description: Install the OpenVPN Manager add-on from Settings → Add-ons before continuing. See documentation for repository URL. Click Submit after the add-on is running.

install_container.title: Install Docker Container
install_container.description: For Home Assistant Container, run OpenVPN Manager as a separate Docker container. See CONTAINER-INSTALL.md in documentation for setup instructions. Use docker-compose or docker run command. Click Submit after the container is running.

upload.title: Upload VPN File
upload.description: Upload your .ovpn file via: Settings → Add-ons → OpenVPN Manager → Files tab → data/configs folder. After uploading, a VPN switch will appear on your dashboard. Click Submit to finish setup.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to OpenVPN add-on. Make sure it's installed and started.

abort.addon_not_running: Add-on is not running. Please start it then try again.
abort.docker_not_available: Docker is not available. For Container installations, mount the Docker socket: add -v /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock to your Home Assistant container startup command, then restart.
abort.container_start_failed: Failed to start OpenVPN container. Check Docker logs for details.
abort.api_not_accessible: Container started but API not responding. Check container logs.
abort.unknown_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the logs.
